parameters.description: states, multiple, no parameter means all
parameters.name: States

children.description: target name, multi seperated by comma
children.name: target

children.description: target name, multi seperated by comma
children.name: target

children.description: The display name for ModuleEnum, possible values include: Group, Symbol
children.name: module

children.description: The display name for server type, possible values include: MT4, MT5
children.name: serverType

parameters.description: A comma separated list of groups, accounts or tickets. You can use "*" mask (any value) and "!" negation symbol while specifying the groups. For example: "demo*,!demoforex" - all groups whose names begin with 'demo', except for the group demoforex.
parameters.name: searchString

parameters.description: The flag of requesting only open orders. When set to 0, all orders are requested; when set to a non-zero value, only open orders are requested.
parameters.name: openOnly

children.description: The login of the client, to whom the order belongs.
children.name: login

children.description: The name of a financial instrument of the order. The maximum length (including the end of line character) is 12 characters.
children.name: symbol

children.description: The number of decimal places in the price of a financial instrument.
children.name: digits

children.description: Type of a trade command. Specified by a value from the Types of trade commands enumeration., 0=Buy 1=Sell 2=BuyLimit 3=SellLimit 4=BuyStop 5=SellStop 6=Balance 7=Credit
children.name: cmd

children.description: Order close time. For balance operations, the time of the operation (open_time) is copied to this field.
children.name: closeTime

children.description: Order state. Specified by a value from the Order status enumeration., 0=OpenNormal 1=OpenRemand 2=OpenRestored 3=ClosedNormal 4=ClosedPart 5=ClosedBy 6=Deleted
children.name: state

children.description: The price level of the order Stop Loss.
children.name: sl

children.description: The price level of the order Take Profit.
children.name: tp

children.description: Reason for placing the order. Specified by a value from the Order placing reasons enumeration., 0=Client 1=Expert 2=Dealer 3=Signal 4=Gateway 5=Mobile 6=Web 7=API
children.name: reason

children.description: Amount of the agent commission of the order.
children.name: commissionAgent

children.description: Order swap in the client's deposit (an accumulated value for the entire order lifetime).
children.name: storage

children.description: Profit from a trade transaction in the client's deposit currency.
children.name: profit

children.description: The amount of tax on the commission in the client's deposit currency. Specified in the base currency per one lot. Additionally charged from the client account with the commission.
children.name: taxes

children.description: The order ID (magic number) set by the client's Expert Advisor.
children.name: magic

children.description: Comment to an order. The maximum length (including the end of line character) is 32 characters.
children.name: comment

children.description: The order ticket number on the external MetaTrader 4 server when using a gateway.
children.name: gwOrder

children.description: The difference between the order open price in the external system and the order open price on the local trade server.Specified in pips.The total open price on the gateway is obtained by adding the difference to the order open price on the local server.
children.name: gwOpenPrice

children.description: The difference between the order close price in the external system and the order close price on the local trade server. Specified in pips. The total close price on the gateway is obtained by adding the difference to the order close price on the local server.
children.name: gwClosePrice

children.description: Order margin currency to deposit currency conversion factor. Added by the server at the moment of position opening (resulting from market order placing or pending order triggering).
children.name: marginRate

children.description: Used for internal purposes. If timestamp of a record has changed, it means that the record has changed.
children.name: timestamp
